name: luxury-brand
style: Elegant high-end photography with rich textures and deep contrast. Emphasis on material quality — visible grain in leather, sheen on metal, depth in fabric. Sparse composition with intentional negative space.
typography: Thin elegant serif with generous spacing and uppercase treatment. Gold on black or cream on deep charcoal.
lighting: Rich dramatic lighting with deep contrast. Key light from one side creating sculpted shadows. Warm golden tones in highlights, cool depth in shadows.
mood: Exclusive, sophisticated, aspirational. Quiet confidence rather than loud statement.
